projectDescription: A JavaScript bookmarklet that fetches answers for Edpuzzle assignments, skips videos, changes playback speed, and automatically submits multiple-choice and AI-generated open-ended answers.
keyFeatures: Fetch and display multiple-choice answers for any Edpuzzle assignment
Automatically submit correct answers for multiple-choice questions
AI-generated responses for open-ended questions using Google Gemini
Video skipper for arbitrary navigation through assignments
Playback speed control (supports Edpuzzle, YouTube, and Vimeo videos)
Prevent auto-pausing when the browser tab loses focus
Works on Edpuzzle, Canvas, and Schoology embeds
No login or browser extension required (beyond CSP bypass)
publicApiSurface: GET /api/media/<media_id> — Proxy Edpuzzle media data including questions and answers
GET /api/captions/<id> — Fetch YouTube captions for AI prompt context
GET /api/models — List available AI models for open-ended generation
POST /api/generate — Stream AI-generated responses for open-ended questions
